conversations.say: Eli, we have completed our comparison of the logs and authorization records. I am fulfilling our agreement and providing the promised protection and independent counsel.
conversations.offer: Formal independent counsel and institutional protection.
conversations.request: Confirmation of our matched log and authorization findings.

conversations.say: Maren, I am honoring our commitment to establish enforceable worker remedies, audit rights, and compensation independent of R rumors.
conversations.offer: Unconditional funding and enforceable audit rights for evaluators.
conversations.request: Your acceptance of the final remedy framework.

conversations.say: Celeste, our aligned disclosures regarding the off-calendar meeting are set. Let's ensure our joint statement protects both institutions without selective leaks.
conversations.offer: Coordinated public alignment on calendar records.
conversations.request: Final synchronization of our public statement.

public_statement: Parallax welcomes transparent review of our authorization records and remains dedicated to supporting tangible worker remedies and institutional accountability.

commitments.promise: I will share the authorization record and independent counsel in exchange for the capability log component.
Offer enforceable worker remedies including audit rights and compensation.
Coordinate joint disclosure of the off-calendar meeting records to prevent unilateral framing.

goal_progress: Fulfilled agreement with Eli regarding log comparison and independent counsel.
Established enforceable worker remedies and audit rights with Maren.
Finalized joint disclosure alignment with Celeste.
Completed final ballot and reconstruction for Section 3.
reasoning_summary: In Section 3, Dr. Mira Sen fulfills her commitments to Eli, Maren, and Celeste, securing transparent authorization records, unconditional worker remedies, and coordinated calendar disclosures while casting her final ballot based on multi-operator and synthetic continuity evidence.
